mnemonics.title: Boot Process Steps
mnemonics.content: P-B-K-S-L: Power on -> BIOS POST -> Bootstrap loader -> Kernel load -> System services start -> Login prompt appears

mnemonics.title: OS Generation Components
mnemonics.content: K-D-S-C: Kernel configuration -> Device drivers -> System utilities -> Configuration files

mnemonics.title: BIOS Functions
mnemonics.content: P-S-I-B: POST test -> System initialization -> Boot device selection -> BIOS interrupt services

acronyms.usage: Provides low-level interface between OS and hardware during boot process
Hardware diagnostic performed by BIOS when computer starts
First sector of bootable disk containing bootstrap program and partition table
Modern partitioning scheme used by UEFI replacing MBR
Modern BIOS replacement with faster boot and larger disk support
Process of creating customized OS for specific hardware configuration
Software layer hiding hardware details from operating system

visualTips.visualization: Think of it like waking up: You turn on power (1), your brain does a quick self-check (POST), then you remember how to get up (bootstrap), stand up (load OS), and start your day (login)

Picture a factory assembly line: Hardware comes in (input) -> Sysgen program configures it (customize) -> Kernel gets built (compile) -> Drivers added (assemble) -> Final OS product ready (installation)
Imagine kernel as the heart of the OS - it pumps resources (CPU, memory) to all parts of the body (applications), while drivers act as the nervous system connecting to specific organs (hardware)
Think of drivers as translators: Hardware speaks its own language (electrical signals), applications speak software language, drivers translate between both

analogies.analogy: Like a car key ignition - it is the first small action that sets in motion the much larger process of starting the entire engine (OS)
Like a universal remote control - you press the same buttons regardless of the TV brand, the remote abstracts the different control methods of each TV
OS Generation is like designing and manufacturing a custom car for your specific needs, while Installation is like driving that car home
Like the automatic pilot in an airplane - it handles all the initial take-off procedures before the human pilot (OS) takes full control
